steps.title: Identify the conversion factor
steps.content: We are given that 1 meter = 100 centimeters. To convert from meters to centimeters, we multiply by 100.

steps.title: Multiply to find the answer
steps.content:
Apply the conversion factor to 35 meters:

$$35 \times 100 = 3500$$

Therefore, 35 meters equals 3500 centimeters.
